title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama. Chat, generate, embed, pull, and push models with a simple API.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama. Works in Node.js and modern browsers.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: PyPI package integrating Ollama models into LangChain LLM, Chat, and Embeddings classes.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI for Ollama with GPT-like interface, code highlighting, PDF uploads, RAG, and admin panel.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama. Generate, chat, pull, and manage models from JVM applications.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive CLI wrapper around Ollama with conversation history, syntax highlighting, and prompt templates.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal retrieval-augmented generation pipeline using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector store.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Turn any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot-style code-completion backend for VS Code.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration letting you use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-codex
summary: Drop-in open-source replacement for OpenAI Codex using Ollama models and a thin adapter layer.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-host a Discord bot that answers questions using any Ollama model with slash commands and thread support.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app that brings Ollama models into channels via mentions or DM.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit chat app template that connects to local Ollama instance with session memory and model switcher.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: Official n8n community node to use Ollama models inside workflows for summarization, translation, or custom prompts.

title: ollama-go
summary: Official Go client library for Ollama. Generate, chat, and manage models from Go programs.
